press_releases.description: List today's RBI press releases from the press-release page with document links.

errors.message: One or more operation inputs are missing or invalid.
errors.user_action: Correct the named input using the operation schema and retry.

errors.message: The requested public resource does not exist or is unavailable.
errors.user_action: Check the resource identifier with a discovery operation before retrying.

errors.message: The website is temporarily rate limiting this operation.
errors.user_action: Wait for the reported retry interval before calling the operation again.

errors.message: The website is temporarily unavailable or returned an invalid response.
errors.user_action: Retry once, then check the website's service status if the error continues.

items.description: Current RBI press releases as listed.

pagination.behavior: RBI lists the current day's releases; the dated archive is not mapped.

press_releases.when_not_to_use: Do not use this for older releases; RBI's dated archive is not mapped.
press_releases.when_to_use: Use this when an agent needs RBI's current press-release listing with direct page links.

press_releases_by_year.description: List RBI press releases for a given year from the archive, with titles and links.

mode.description: RBI archive display mode; 03 lists a year.

yr.description: Calendar year of the archive page.

items.description: Press releases RBI published in the requested year, newest first.

title.description: Press release title as shown in RBI's archive.

url.description: Direct link to the press release page on rbi.org.in.

pagination.behavior: Returns the year page RBI serves; recent years list the latest releases first.

press_releases_by_year.when_not_to_use: Do not use this for today's releases; use press_releases_feed.
press_releases_by_year.when_to_use: Use this for past RBI press releases from a specific year.

press_releases_feed.description: List the Reserve Bank of India's newest press releases from its official RSS feed.

errors.message: One or more operation inputs are missing or invalid.
errors.user_action: Correct the named input using the operation schema and retry.

errors.message: The requested public resource does not exist or is unavailable.
errors.user_action: Check the resource identifier with a discovery operation before retrying.

errors.message: The website is temporarily rate limiting this operation.
errors.user_action: Wait for the reported retry interval before calling the operation again.

errors.message: The website is temporarily unavailable or returned an invalid response.
errors.user_action: Retry once, then check the website's service status if the error continues.

items.description: Newest RBI press releases, newest first.

links.description: Links to the press release, each with a url.

published.description: Publication timestamp as given by the feed.

pagination.behavior: The RSS feed carries only RBI's newest press releases.

press_releases_feed.when_not_to_use: Do not use this to search RBI's historical archive; the feed carries only the newest items.
press_releases_feed.when_to_use: Use this when an agent needs the latest RBI announcements with timestamps and summaries.

constraints: Site permissions, rate limits, and anti-automation rules still apply
human_boundaries: RBI's dated archive pages and search forms are not mapped; this covers the newest listings and feed.
coverage.website_parity: Mapping mode can inspect the remaining website while direct request recipes are compiled. Browser commands are never counted as runtime parity.
